title: Death Note : Reimagined
description: A working death note to Minecraft which can kill mobs and players.
body:
Adds content from the Death Note anime to Minecraft.

## Ported to Modrinth by TheSebby100!

# [Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/death-note-mod)
